description: A small bag containing a pocket dimension, allowing it to hold more than a purse of similar design. Whenever you take an item out, what you want is automatically on top. If it is torn, its contents fall out onto the ground.

A large sized hiking backpack with plenty of storage space. It contains a pocket diemsion, allowing it to store more than a similar bag. Whenever you take an item out, what you want is automatically on top. If it is torn, its contents fall out onto the ground.
